## Medical Application Checklist Examples

<!-- Replace sections above with domain-specific checklists from examples below -->

### Security & Privacy Audit

- [ ] CHK-SEC-001 Verify no OAuth tokens in localStorage/sessionStorage/IndexedDB
- [ ] CHK-SEC-002 Confirm SQLite database uses SQLCipher encryption (check file header)
- [ ] CHK-SEC-003 Test Keychain storage/retrieval for FHIR access tokens
- [ ] CHK-SEC-004 Verify no PHI/PII appears in console logs (test all user flows)
- [ ] CHK-SEC-005 Confirm CSP headers block unauthorized domains (test network panel)
- [ ] CHK-SEC-006 Test FileVault requirement check on startup (warn user if disabled)
- [ ] CHK-SEC-007 Verify audit log is append-only and stored separately from medical DB
- [ ] CHK-SEC-008 Confirm Electron context isolation enabled (check webPreferences config)
- [ ] CHK-SEC-009 Verify nodeIntegration disabled in renderer process
- [ ] CHK-SEC-010 Test certificate pinning for FHIR API connections

### Medical Data Integrity Review

- [ ] CHK-MED-001 Confirm FHIR resources store raw JSON alongside parsed fields (check DB schema)
- [ ] CHK-MED-002 Verify lab observations include reference ranges (query Observation table)
- [ ] CHK-MED-003 Check all timestamps are ISO 8601 with timezone (no naive datetimes)
- [ ] CHK-MED-004 Confirm DICOM files are never modified (check file modification times)
- [ ] CHK-MED-005 Verify LOINC codes preserved for lab results (check Observation.code field)
- [ ] CHK-MED-006 Test idempotent sync (run twice, database unchanged on second run)
- [ ] CHK-MED-007 Verify FHIR R4 validation before database writes (invalid resources rejected)
- [ ] CHK-MED-008 Test handling of missing reference ranges (graceful degradation)
- [ ] CHK-MED-009 Verify units stored with all numeric lab values
- [ ] CHK-MED-010 Test sync resumption after network interruption

### FHIR R4 Compliance Check

- [ ] CHK-FHIR-001 Verify OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE implemented
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-002 Test automatic token refresh before expiration
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-003 Confirm SMART on FHIR scopes requested: patient/*.read
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-004 Verify Patient resource parsing (all required fields)
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-005 Verify Observation resource parsing (value[x] polymorphism handled)
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-006 Verify Condition resource parsing (clinical status codes)
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-007 Verify MedicationRequest parsing (dosage instructions)
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-008 Verify Procedure resource parsing (performed date/time)
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-009 Test pagination handling (bundle.link.next followed)
- [ ] CHK-FHIR-010 Verify 429 rate limit response handling (exponential backoff)

### DICOM Viewer Validation

- [ ] CHK-DCM-001 Verify MR (MRI) modality support (all 111 files from dataset)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-002 Verify CT modality support (if applicable)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-003 Verify XR (X-ray) modality support (if applicable)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-004 Test series navigation (switch between T1/T2/STIR sequences)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-005 Test instance navigation (scroll through sagittal/axial slices)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-006 Verify window/level presets (Soft Tissue, Bone, Brain)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-007 Test custom window/level adjustment (mouse drag)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-008 Verify measurement tools (Length, Angle, ROI)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-009 Test annotation persistence (save to SQLite, restore on reopen)
- [ ] CHK-DCM-010 Verify image rendering performance (<500ms load time per image)

### Accessibility Compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA)

- [ ] CHK-ACC-001 All medical terms have plain-English tooltips (hover/focus)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-002 Keyboard shortcuts work for timeline navigation (arrow keys, page up/down)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-003 Keyboard shortcuts work for DICOM viewer (w/l, series nav)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-004 Keyboard shortcuts work for AI chat (Cmd+K or custom)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-005 Font sizes adjustable without breaking layout (test 150%, 200%)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-006 Dark mode high-contrast verified (4.5:1 minimum for text)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-007 Screen reader announces lab values correctly (NVDA/VoiceOver tested)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-008 Screen reader announces DICOM image metadata
- [ ] CHK-ACC-009 Color-blind friendly abnormal value indicators (not red/green only)
- [ ] CHK-ACC-010 Focus indicators visible for all interactive elements

### Offline-First Verification

- [ ] CHK-OFF-001 Timeline loads without network (cached data displayed)
- [ ] CHK-OFF-002 DICOM viewer works offline (local file access)
- [ ] CHK-OFF-003 Lab trends render from cache (no API calls)
- [ ] CHK-OFF-004 AI chat shows graceful "offline" message when API unavailable
- [ ] CHK-OFF-005 FHIR sync failure doesn't block app startup (test airplane mode on launch)
- [ ] CHK-OFF-006 UI state persists across restarts (selected patient, tab, filters)
- [ ] CHK-OFF-007 Sync status indicator shows "last synced" timestamp
- [ ] CHK-OFF-008 Manual sync button retries failed operations
- [ ] CHK-OFF-009 Conflict resolution strategy defined (last-write-wins or user prompt)
- [ ] CHK-OFF-010 Network reconnection triggers automatic sync

### Performance Optimization (Apple Silicon)

- [ ] CHK-OPT-001 App startup time <3 seconds on M1 Max (measured with `time` command)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-002 DICOM image load time <500ms per image (measured in DevTools)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-003 AI response latency <5 seconds p95 (measure 100 queries)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-004 Memory usage <2GB with all 111 DICOM files cached (Activity Monitor)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-005 SQLite queries <1ms for timeline fetch (EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-006 Native ARM64 build verified (file arch output, no Rosetta)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-007 Metal GPU acceleration enabled for DICOM rendering (check renderer)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-008 Python runtime is ARM64 native (python3 --version, arch)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-009 No main thread blocking operations >16ms (60fps target)
- [ ] CHK-OPT-010 Bundle size <200MB (electron-builder output)

### Constitution Compliance Review

- [ ] CHK-CON-001 Security & Privacy: All 5 checklist items verified
- [ ] CHK-CON-002 Medical Data Integrity: All 7 requirements met
- [ ] CHK-CON-003 Offline-First: Core features work without network
- [ ] CHK-CON-004 Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance verified
- [ ] CHK-CON-005 Apple Silicon: Native ARM64 performance targets met
- [ ] CHK-CON-006 No cloud storage or sync dependencies introduced
- [ ] CHK-CON-007 No third-party analytics or telemetry added
- [ ] CHK-CON-008 All FHIR data preserves raw JSON
- [ ] CHK-CON-009 No DICOM files modified (read-only verified)
- [ ] CHK-CON-010 Constitutional violations (if any) justified and approved

---

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline (e.g., "PASS - verified in commit abc123")
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
- Use CHK prefix with category (SEC, MED, FHIR, DCM, ACC, OFF, OPT, CON)
- All items in Security & Privacy Audit are MANDATORY for medical data features
- Constitution Compliance Review should be run before every release
